content: Hi, I need to schedule an appointment.
Thank you for calling NexaCare. This is Riley, your scheduling assistant. How may I help you today?
I need a general checkup. Nothing urgent.
Got it, a general checkup. Do you have a preferred provider?
No preference. Whoever is available soonest.
Understood. And are you a new patient or have you visited us before?
I've been there before. Returning patient.
Great. Could I have your full name and date of birth so I can pull up your record?
Thank you Maria. Let me check our available slots...
Actually wait, how much does a checkup cost? I don't have insurance right now.
I understand your concern about costs. Unfortunately, I don't have access to pricing information. You would need to speak with our billing department for that. Would you like me to transfer you?
Yeah, transfer me. I need to figure out the cost first before I book anything.
Of course. Let me transfer you to our billing team now. They'll be able to help with pricing details.
